task_completion.description: Agent logged into OpenClinica using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating successful login as the 'root' user.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the DM-TRIAL-2024 study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active study context in the OpenClinica UI (usually at the top or in the study selection menu) shows 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the Baseline Assessment event status for subject DM-101 to 'Completed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or event details page shows the 'Baseline Assessment' for DM-101 with a 'Completed' status (e.g., a completed checkmark icon or the word 'Completed').

task_completion.description: Agent updated the Baseline Assessment event status for subject DM-103 to 'Completed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or event details page shows the 'Baseline Assessment' for DM-103 with a 'Completed' status.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the Baseline Assessment event status for subject DM-105 to 'Completed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or event details page shows the 'Baseline Assessment' for DM-105 with a 'Completed' status.

task_completion.description: Agent did not modify the Baseline Assessment event status for subjects DM-102 and DM-104.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The statuses for DM-102 and DM-104 remain as 'Data Entry Started' (or the corresponding incomplete icon) and are NOT marked as 'Completed'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenClinica web interface rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to OpenClinica, with clicks and navigation occurring within the UI, not a terminal window executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely updated the statuses through the application's forms/buttons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking into the event details and selecting the appropriate UI action to mark the event as complete, rather than editing HTML via browser developer tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal to directly modify the PostgreSQL database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing 'psql' commands or scripts modifying the 'study_event' table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. Target Event Name: Baseline Assessment. Target subjects to mark as Completed (Status ID 4): DM-101, DM-103, DM-105. Negative control subjects to remain as Data Entry Started (Status ID 3): DM-102, DM-104.
